title: SandSim: Curve-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Reconstructing Sand Painting Processes
summary: Sand painting is a process-driven art where visual appearance emerges from granular accumulation. Given a single image, reconstructing a plausible sand painting process requires modeling coherent stroke structures and material-dependent effects. Existing methods, including stroke-based optimization and diffusion-based video synthesis, often lack structural coherence and material consistency, leading to unrealistic drawing sequences. We present SandSim, a framework that reconstructs a sand painting process from a single image. We introduce a curve-guided Gaussian representation that models strokes as sequences of anisotropic primitives along continuous trajectories, whose smooth kernels capture the soft boundaries of sand strokes and enable coherent stroke formation. We further adopt a subtractive compositing scheme to model light attenuation during sand accumulation. We incorporate a semantic-guided planning module for scene decomposition and drawing order inference. Our framework jointly optimizes stroke geometry and appearance and can be integrated with a physics-based simulator for interactive sand dynamics and editing. Experiments show that our method produces temporally coherent and visually realistic results, achieving improved reconstruction quality and perceptual fidelity compared to existing approaches.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及多个与用户兴趣高度相关的主题：Gaussian Splatting（高斯泼溅）、3D Reconstruction（3D重建）、以及物理仿真（Physics-based simulator for interactive sand dynamics）。论文提出了一种曲线引导的高斯表示方法用于重建沙画绘制过程，同时结合了语义引导的场景分解和绘制顺序推断，并集成了基于物理的仿真器用于交互式沙粒动力学。这些内容与用户关注的Video Generation、Gaussian Splatting、3D Reconstruction、Physical Animation、Graphics等方向紧密相关。

AI.tldr: 提出SandSim框架，从单张图像重建沙画创作过程，通过曲线引导的高斯表示、减法合成和语义规划，生成时序连贯且物理真实的沙画序列。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（基于笔触优化、扩散视频合成）重建沙画过程时缺乏结构连贯性和材质一致性，导致绘制序列不真实。
AI.method: 1) 曲线引导的高斯表示（各向异性基元沿连续轨迹建模笔触，平滑核捕捉沙粒软边界）；2) 减法合成方案模拟沙粒累积过程中的光衰减；3) 语义引导的规划模块用于场景分解和绘制顺序推断；4) 联合优化笔触几何与外观，可集成物理仿真器。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法生成的沙画序列在时间连贯性和视觉真实性上优于现有方法，重建质量和感知保真度均有提升。
AI.conclusion: SandSim有效解决了单图沙画过程重建中结构连贯性与材质一致性的难题，为过程驱动艺术重建提供了新思路。

title: Reconstruction by Generation: 3D Multi-Object Scene Reconstruction from Sparse Observations
summary: Accurately reconstructing complex full multi-object scenes from sparse observations remains a core challenge in computer vision and a key step toward scalable and reliable simulation for robotics. In this work, we introduce RecGen, a generative framework for probabilistic joint estimation of object and part shapes, as well as their pose under occlusion and partial visibility from one or multiple RGB-D images. By leveraging compositional synthetic scene generation and strong 3D shape priors, RecGen generalizes across diverse object types and real-world environments. RecGen achieves state-of-the-art performance on complex, heavily occluded datasets, robustly handling severe occlusions, symmetric objects, object parts, and intricate geometry and texture. Despite using nearly 80% fewer training meshes than the previous state of the art SAM3D, RecGen outperforms it by 30.1% in geometric shape quality, 9.1% in texture reconstruction, and 33.9% in pose estimation.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了RecGen框架，利用生成式方法从稀疏观测中进行多物体场景的3D重建，涉及3D物体/部件形状估计、位姿估计、遮挡处理等。与用户的兴趣点"3D Reconstruction"、"Gaussian Splatting"、"3D Generation"、"Geometric"高度相关，属于核心研究方向。

AI.tldr: RecGen是一种生成式框架，能够从稀疏的RGB-D观测中概率性地联合估计物体和部件的形状及其姿态，在严重遮挡、对称物体等复杂场景下达到SOTA性能，且相比SAM3D使用更少训练数据，在几何质量、纹理重建和姿态估计上分别提升30.1%、9.1%和33.9%。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏观测中准确重建复杂多物体场景是计算机视觉的核心挑战，也是实现可扩展、可靠机器人仿真的关键步骤。现有方法在处理严重遮挡、对称物体、部件级细节等方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 提出RecGen生成式框架，利用组合式合成场景生成和强3D形状先验，从单张或多张RGB-D图像中对物体和部件形状及其姿态进行概率性联合估计。
AI.result: 在复杂高遮挡数据集上达到SOTA，相比SAM3D，几何形状质量提升30.1%，纹理重建提升9.1%，姿态估计提升33.9%，且训练网格减少约80%。
AI.conclusion: RecGen通过在严重遮挡、对称物体、部件级几何与纹理等复杂场景下的鲁棒性表现，验证了生成式框架在稀疏观测多物体场景重建中的有效性。

title: Faster 3D Gaussian Splatting Convergence via Structure-Aware Densification
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting has emerged as a powerful scene representation for real-time novel-view synthesis. However, its standard adaptive density control relies on screen-space positional gradients, which do not distinguish between geometric misplacement and frequency aliasing, often leading to either over-blurred high-frequency textures or inefficient over-densification. We present a structure-aware densification framework. Our key insight is that the decision to subdivide a Gaussian should be driven by an explicit comparison between its projected screen-space extent and the local structure of the texture it seeks to represent. We introduce a multi-scale frequency analysis combining structure tensors with Laplacian scale space analysis to estimate the dominant frequency at each pixel, enabling robust supervision across varying texture scales. Based on this analysis, we define $η$, a per-Gaussian, per-axis frequency violation metric that indicates when a primitive may be under-resolving local texture details. Unlike methods that perform isotropic splitting (e.g., splitting each Gaussian into two smaller ones with uniform shape), our approach performs anisotropic splitting. For each axis with high $η$, we compute a split factor to better resolve the local frequency content. We further introduce a multiview consistency criterion that aggregates $η$ observations across multiple views. By performing densification early and faster, we skip the lengthy iterative densification phases required by baseline methods and achieve significantly faster convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method also achieves superior reconstruction quality, particularly in high-frequency regions.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了基于结构感知稠密化的3D高斯泼溅加速收敛方法，直接属于用户兴趣中的"Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Reconstruction"领域，并且涉及几何分析、纹理频率处理等与"Geometric"紧密相关的内容。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结构感知的3D高斯致密化框架，通过多尺度频率分析和各向异性分裂策略，在加快收敛速度的同时提升了高频区域的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 标准3D高斯溅射的自适应密度控制仅依赖屏幕空间位置梯度，无法区分几何错位和频率混叠，导致高保真纹理区域过模糊或低效过密化。
AI.method: 结合结构张量和拉普拉斯尺度空间分析进行多尺度频率分析，估计每个像素的主导频率；定义每个高斯每个轴的频率违反指标η；基于η进行各向异性分裂；引入多视角一致性准则聚合多视角观测。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中取得了优于基线方法的重建质量，特别是在高频区域；收敛速度显著快于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式比较高斯投影屏幕空间范围与待表示纹理的局部结构来决定是否细分，避免了过密化和过模糊问题，实现了更快收敛和更优重建。

title: MotuBrain: An Advanced World Action Model for Robot Control
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong semantic generalization but often lack fine-grained modeling of world dynamics. Recent work explores video generation models as a foundation for world modeling, leading to unified World Action Models (WAMs) that jointly model visual dynamics and actions. We present MotuBrain, a unified multimodal generative model that jointly models video and action under a UniDiffuser formulation with a three-stream Mixture-of-Transformers architecture. A single model supports multiple inference modes, including policy learning, world modeling, video generation, inverse dynamics, and joint video-action prediction, while scaling to heterogeneous multimodal data such as video-only and cross-embodiment robot data. To improve real-world applicability, MotuBrain introduces a unified multiview representation, explicit language-action coupling, and an efficient inference stack, achieving over 50x speedup for real-time deployment.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出的MotuBrain是一个统一的多模态生成模型，联合建模视频和动作，涉及视频生成（Video Generation）、世界模型（World Model）以及机器人控制中的视觉-语言-动作建模。虽然核心应用场景是机器人控制，但其关键技术（视频生成作为世界模型的基础、统一多模态生成框架）与用户的视频生成、世界模型兴趣点高度相关，因此保留。

AI.tldr: MotuBrain是一个统一的多模态生成模型，基于UniDiffuser和三流MoT架构，联合建模视频和动作，支持多种推理模式，实现50倍以上实时部署加速。
AI.motivation: VLA模型缺乏细粒度的世界动态建模，现有工作探索用视频生成模型作为世界模型基础，需要统一的World Action Model来联合建模视觉动态和动作。
AI.method: 采用UniDiffuser公式下的三流Mixture-of-Transformers架构，统一多视图表示、显式语言-动作耦合、高效推理栈，支持异构多模态数据（纯视频、跨实体机器人数据）。
AI.result: 支持策略学习、世界建模、视频生成、逆动力学、联合视频-动作预测等多种推理模式；实现超过50倍速度提升以支持实时部署。
AI.conclusion: MotuBrain通过统一的生成式框架有效联合建模视频和动作，显著提升了真实世界应用的部署效率。

title: Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting in the Wild
summary: We propose a 3D novel sparse-view synthesis framework for unconstrained real-world scenarios that contain distractors. Unlike existing methods that primarily perform novel-view synthesis from a sparse set of constrained images without transient elements or leverage unconstrained dense image collections to enhance 3D representation in real-world scenarios, our method not only effectively tackles sparse unconstrained image collections, but also shows high-quality 3D rendering results. To do this, we introduce reference-guided view refinement with a diffusion model using a transient mask and a reference image to enhance the 3D representation and mitigate artifacts in rendered views. Furthermore, we address sparse regions in the Gaussian field via pseudo-view generation along with a sparsity-aware Gaussian replication strategy to amplify Gaussians in the sparse regions. Extensive experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate that our methodology consistently outperforms existing methods (e.g., PSNR - 17.2%, SSIM - 10.8%, LPIPS - 4.0%) and provides high-fidelity 3D rendering results. This advancement paves the way for realizing unconstrained real-world scenarios without labor-intensive data acquisition. Our project page is available at $\href{https://robotic-vision-lab.github.io/SaveWildGS/}{here}$

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及稀疏视角下的3D高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）方法，与用户兴趣中的"Gaussian Splatting"、"3D Reconstruction"、"3D Generation"高度匹配。论文聚焦于从稀疏无约束图像集合中进行3D场景重建和新视角合成，属于这些兴趣领域的直接应用和延伸。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对无约束真实场景的3D新视角稀疏合成框架(SaveWildGS)，通过扩散模型引导的视图细化、瞬态掩码和稀疏感知高斯复制策略，在稀疏无约束图像集合上实现高质量3D渲染，性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么只能处理受约束的稀疏图像（不含瞬态元素），要么需要依赖密集的无约束图像集合。实际场景中常面临稀疏且包含干扰物（如行人、车辆等瞬态元素）的无约束图像，缺乏同时解决这两个挑战的方法。
AI.method: 1) 引入参考引导的视图细化机制，结合扩散模型、瞬态掩码和参考图像来增强3D表示并减少伪影；2) 通过伪视图生成处理高斯场中的稀疏区域；3) 提出稀疏感知的高斯复制策略，在稀疏区域增强高斯分布。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，PSNR提升17.2%，SSIM提升10.8%，LPIPS降低4.0%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需密集数据采集即可实现无约束真实场景的高保真3D渲染铺平了道路。

title: Softmax-GS: Generalized Gaussians Learning When to Blend or Bound
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D GS) is widely adopted for novel view synthesis due to its high training and rendering efficiency. However, its efficiency relies on the key assumption that Gaussians do not overlap in the 3D space, which leads to noticeable artifacts and view inconsistencies. In addition, the inherently diffuse boundaries of Gaussians hinder accurate reconstruction of sharp object edges. We propose Softmax-GS, a unified solution that addresses both the view-inconsistency and the diffuse-boundary problem by enforcing a softmax-based competition in overlapping regions between two Gaussians. With learnable parameters controlling the strength of the competition, it enables a continuous spectrum from smooth color blending to crisp, well-defined boundaries. Our formulation explicitly preserves order invariance for any two overlapping Gaussians and ensures that the output transmittance remains unchanged irrespective of the extent of overlapping, preventing undesirable discontinuities in the rendered output. Ablation experiments on simple geometries demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of Softmax-GS, and evaluations on real-world benchmarks show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving both reconstruction quality and parameter efficiency.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出Softmax-GS，改进3D Gaussian Splatting方法，解决了视图不一致和边界模糊问题，显著提升了3D重建和渲染质量。论文直接涉及用户感兴趣的Gaussian Splatting和3D Reconstruction领域，属于核心相关论文。

AI.tldr: Softmax-GS通过Softmax竞争机制解决3D高斯溅射中视图不一致和模糊边界问题，实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 3D GS假设高斯在3D空间中不重叠，导致伪影和视图不一致；此外高斯固有的模糊边界难以重建锐利边缘。
AI.method: 在重叠区域引入基于Softmax的竞争机制，通过可学习参数控制竞争强度，实现从平滑混合到清晰边界的连续谱系，并保持顺序不变性和透射率一致性。
AI.result: 在简单几何体上的消融实验验证了各组件有效性，在真实世界基准上达到SOTA，提升了重建质量和参数效率。
AI.conclusion: Softmax-GS统一解决了视图不一致和边界模糊两大问题，为3D GS提供了更高质量的渲染方案。

title: 3D-ReGen: A Unified 3D Geometry Regeneration Framework
summary: We consider the problem of regenerating 3D objects from 2D images and initial 3D shapes. Most 3D generators operate in a one-shot fashion, converting text or images to a 3D object with limited controllability. We introduce instead 3D-ReGen, a 3D regenerator that is conditioned on an initial 3D shape. This conceptually simple formulation allows us to support numerous useful tasks, including 3D enhancement, reconstruction, and editing. 3D-ReGen uses a new conditioning mechanism based on VecSet, which allows the regenerator to update or improve the input geometry with consistent fine-grained details. 3D-ReGen learns a widely applicable regeneration prior from off-the-shelf 3D datasets via self-supervised pretext tasks and augmentations, without additional annotations. We evaluate both the geometric consistency and fine-grained quality of 3D-ReGen, achieving state-of-the-art performance in controllable 3D generation across several tasks.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出3D-ReGen框架，专注于从2D图像和初始3D形状进行3D几何重生成，涉及3D重建、3D生成、几何编辑等任务，与用户的"3D Generation"、"3D Reconstruction"、"Geometric"等兴趣高度匹配。

AI.tldr: 提出了3D-ReGen，一种基于初始3D形状条件的三维再生器，通过VecSet条件机制和自监督预训练，在3D增强、重建和编辑等任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成器多为一次性生成（text/image转3D），可控性有限，缺乏对初始3D形状的利用和细粒度控制能力。
AI.method: 1) 提出3D-ReGen再生框架，以初始3D形状为条件；2) 设计基于VecSet的条件机制，实现输入几何的一致细粒度更新；3) 通过自监督预训练任务和数据增强从现有3D数据集学习通用再生先验。
AI.result: 在几何一致性和细粒度质量评估上，3D-ReGen在可控3D生成的多个任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 3D-ReGen通过再生范式有效支持3D增强、重建和编辑等任务，为可控3D生成提供了一种新思路。

title: PhyCo: Learning Controllable Physical Priors for Generative Motion
summary: Modern video diffusion models excel at appearance synthesis but still struggle with physical consistency: objects drift, collisions lack realistic rebound, and material responses seldom match their underlying properties. We present PhyCo, a framework that introduces continuous, interpretable, and physically grounded control into video generation. Our approach integrates three key components: (i) a large-scale dataset of over 100K photorealistic simulation videos where friction, restitution, deformation, and force are systematically varied across diverse scenarios; (ii) physics-supervised fine-tuning of a pretrained diffusion model using a ControlNet conditioned on pixel-aligned physical property maps; and (iii) VLM-guided reward optimization, where a fine-tuned vision-language model evaluates generated videos with targeted physics queries and provides differentiable feedback. This combination enables a generative model to produce physically consistent and controllable outputs through variations in physical attributes-without any simulator or geometry reconstruction at inference. On the Physics-IQ benchmark, PhyCo significantly improves physical realism over strong baselines, and human studies confirm clearer and more faithful control over physical attributes. Our results demonstrate a scalable path toward physically consistent, controllable generative video models that generalize beyond synthetic training environments.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及可控物理先验的视频生成，与用户的"Video Generation"（视频生成）和"Physical Animation"（物理动画）兴趣高度匹配。论文提出在视频生成中引入物理一致性控制，涵盖摩擦、恢复、变形等物理属性，直接关联到物理动画和视频生成的核心主题。同时与"World Model"（世界模型）和"Interactive Video Generation"（交互式视频生成）也有一定相关性。

AI.tldr: PhyCo是一个框架，通过结合大规模物理仿真数据集、物理监督微调（ControlNet）和VLM引导的奖励优化，实现了对视频扩散模型生成内容的物理一致性控制，无需推理时使用仿真器或几何重建。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在视觉外观合成上表现出色，但生成的视频缺乏物理一致性：物体漂移、碰撞缺乏真实反弹、材料响应与物理属性不匹配。
AI.method: (i) 构建超过10万段包含不同摩擦、恢复、变形和力参数的仿真视频数据集；(ii) 使用物理属性图作为条件的ControlNet对预训练扩散模型进行物理监督微调；(iii) 利用微调后的视觉-语言模型（VLM）对生成视频进行物理查询评估并提供可微分的奖励反馈。
AI.result: 在Physics-IQ基准测试中，PhyCo显著提升了物理真实性，优于强基线方法；人工研究也证实其对物理属性的控制更清晰、更忠实。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建物理一致且可控的生成式视频模型提供了一条可扩展的路径，且能泛化到合成训练环境之外。

title: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling
summary: Recent visual generation models have made major progress in photorealism, typography, instruction following, and interactive editing, yet they still struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding. We argue that the field should move beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent visual generation: plausible visuals grounded in structure, dynamics, domain knowledge, and causal relations. To frame this shift, we introduce a five-level taxonomy: Atomic Generation, Conditional Generation, In-Context Generation, Agentic Generation, and World-Modeling Generation, progressing from passive renderers to interactive, agentic, world-aware generators. We analyze key technical drivers, including flow matching, unified understanding-and-generation models, improved visual representations, post-training, reward modeling, data curation, synthetic data distillation, and sampling acceleration. We further show that current evaluations often overestimate progress by emphasizing perceptual quality while missing structural, temporal, and causal failures. By combining benchmark review, in-the-wild stress tests, and expert-constrained case studies, this roadmap offers a capability-centered lens for understanding, evaluating, and advancing the next generation of intelligent visual generation systems.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文系统性地探讨了视觉生成技术从原子映射到智能体世界模型的发展演进，明确将世界模型（World Model）作为最高层次的目标，同时涉及视频生成（Video Generation）、交互式生成（Interactive、Agentic Generation）等用户关注的核心方向。论文提出的五级分类体系及其对智能视觉生成的讨论与用户的多项研究兴趣（Video Generation, World Model, Interactive Video Generation等）高度相关。虽然是一篇综述/路线图论文，但其覆盖的主题与用户兴趣直接匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉生成应从外观合成转向“智能视觉生成”，并引入五级分类体系（原子生成、条件生成、上下文生成、智能体生成、世界模型生成），分析了关键技术和评估缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在照片真实感等方面进步显著，但在空间推理、持久状态、长期一致性和因果理解方面仍有不足，需要超越外观合成走向结构、动力学和因果关系驱动的智能生成。
AI.method: 提出五级分类法（从被动渲染到交互式世界感知生成），分析流匹配、统一理解-生成模型、视觉表征改进、后训练、奖励建模、数据整理、合成数据蒸馏和采样加速等关键技术。
AI.result: 当前评估往往高估进展，因为强调感知质量而忽略了结构、时序和因果层面的失败；通过基准评测、野外压力测试和专家约束案例研究揭示了这些不足。
AI.conclusion: 该路线图提供了以能力为中心的视角，用于理解、评估和推动下一代智能视觉生成系统的发展。

title: Generalizable Sparse-View 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained Images
summary: Reconstructing 3D scenes from sparse, unposed images remains challenging under real-world conditions with varying illumination and transient occlusions. Existing methods rely on scene-specific optimization using appearance embeddings or dynamic masks, which requires extensive per-scene training and fails under sparse views. Moreover, evaluations on limited scenes raise questions about generalization. We present GenWildSplat, a feed-forward framework for sparse-view outdoor reconstruction that requires no per-scene optimization. Given unposed internet images, GenWildSplat predicts depth, camera parameters, and 3D Gaussians in a canonical space using learned geometric priors. An appearance adapter modulates appearance for target lighting conditions, while semantic segmentation handles transient objects. Through curriculum learning on synthetic and real data, GenWildSplat generalizes across diverse illumination and occlusion patterns. Evaluations on PhotoTourism and MegaScenes benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art feed-forward rendering quality, achieving real-time inference without test-time optimization

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出GenWildSplat，一种无需逐场景优化的前馈框架，从稀疏无约束图像中进行3D重建（预测深度、相机参数和3D高斯）。其核心涉及3D重建（3D Reconstruction）、高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）以及几何先验学习（Geometric），与用户的多项研究兴趣直接匹配。

AI.tldr: GenWildSplat是一种前馈式框架，无需逐场景优化，能从稀疏、无位姿的互联网图像中实时重建高质量3D场景，并在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖逐场景优化（如外观嵌入或动态掩码），在稀疏视图和真实世界光照/遮挡变化下泛化能力差，且评估场景有限，难以验证通用性。
AI.method: 提出前馈式框架GenWildSplat，利用学习到的几何先验预测深度、相机参数和规范空间中的3D高斯；引入外观适配器调节目标光照条件，语义分割处理瞬态物体；采用课程学习策略在合成和真实数据上训练。
AI.result: 在PhotoTourism和MegaScenes基准测试中，达到前馈式方法最先进的渲染质量，实现无需测试时间优化的实时推理。
AI.conclusion: GenWildSplat成功解决了稀疏、无位姿图像在复杂户外场景下的3D重建问题，具备强泛化能力和实时性能。

title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation
comment: Extended version of ICCV 25 paper HERMES, Code: https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2, Project page: https://h-embodvis.github.io/HERMESV2/
summary: Driving world models serve as a pivotal technology for autonomous driving by simulating environmental dynamics. However, existing approaches predominantly focus on future scene generation, often overlooking comprehensive 3D scene understanding. Conversely, while Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities, they lack the capacity to predict future geometric evolution, creating a significant disparity between semantic interpretation and physical simulation. To bridge this gap, we propose HERMES++, a unified driving world model that integrates 3D scene understanding and future geometry prediction within a single framework. Our approach addresses the distinct requirements of these tasks through synergistic designs. First, a BEV representation consolidates multi-view spatial information into a structure compatible with LLMs. Second, we introduce LLM-enhanced world queries to facilitate knowledge transfer from the understanding branch. Third, a Current-to-Future Link is designed to bridge the temporal gap, conditioning geometric evolution on semantic context. Finally, to enforce structural integrity, we employ a Joint Geometric Optimization strategy that integrates explicit geometric constraints with implicit latent regularization to align internal representations with geometry-aware priors. Extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method. HERMES++ achieves strong performance, outperforming specialist approaches in both future point cloud prediction and 3D scene understanding tasks. The model and code will be publicly released at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了一种统一的驾驶世界模型（HERMES++），结合了3D场景理解与未来几何预测，涉及世界模型（World Model）、3D场景理解与生成、几何推理等主题，与用户感兴趣的世界模型、3D Generation、Geometric等方向高度相关。

AI.tldr: HERMES++是一个统一的驾驶世界模型，通过BEV表示、LLM增强查询、时序链接和联合几何优化策略，同时实现了3D场景理解和未来几何预测，在多个基准测试中超越了专业方法。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型主要关注未来场景生成，缺乏全面的3D场景理解能力；而大语言模型虽具备推理能力，但无法预测未来几何演化，导致语义理解与物理模拟之间存在显著差距。
AI.method: 1) BEV表示整合多视角空间信息；2) LLM增强的世界查询实现知识迁移；3) Current-to-Future Link桥接时序鸿沟；4) 联合几何优化策略结合显式几何约束与隐式潜在正则化。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，HERMES++在未来的点云预测和3D场景理解任务上均超越了专业方法。
AI.conclusion: HERMES++通过统一框架成功弥合了语义理解与物理模拟之间的鸿沟，实现了3D场景理解与未来几何预测的协同优化。
